expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: Game cards in the main content grid are clipped on the right side. The third column is only partially visible, making several game tiles look cut off and potentially hard to tap.
The category navigation row overflows the screen. The 'Hot Games' tab is cut off at the right edge, which looks broken and may hide additional tabs.
The fixed bottom navigation appears to overlap the lower game content, with game tiles visible behind or immediately under it.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue mentions a misspelling of 'Jackpots' or any text/spelling defect; all reported issues describe layout and overflow problems.
